description: Following strict TDD, add a DynamoDB table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) and extend the Step Functions state machine with DynamoDB PutItem/UpdateItem tasks for pipeline metadata tracking. Then update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect changes.
steps:
Step 1 - Write failing tests in a new file tests/unit/test_dynamodb_metadata.py (following the pattern in test_step_functions.py with the shared 'template' fixture from conftest.py). Tests to write:
  - test_dynamodb_table_exists: Verify exactly 1 AWS::DynamoDB::Table resource exists
  - test_dynamodb_table_has_correct_key_schema: Verify partition key is 'audioId' (S type) with KeyType HASH
  - test_dynamodb_table_has_on_demand_billing: Verify BillingMode is PAY_PER_REQUEST
  - test_dynamodb_table_has_encryption: Verify SSESpecification.SSEEnabled is true
  - test_dynamodb_table_has_point_in_time_recovery: Verify PointInTimeRecoverySpecification.PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled is true
  - test_state_machine_definition_contains_dynamodb_putitem: Verify the state machine definition string contains 'dynamodb:putItem' or 'PutItem' DynamoDB task reference
  - test_state_machine_definition_contains_dynamodb_updateitem: Verify the state machine definition contains 'dynamodb:updateItem' or 'UpdateItem' DynamoDB task reference
  - test_state_machine_role_has_dynamodb_permissions: Verify an IAM policy exists granting dynamodb:PutItem and dynamodb:UpdateItem to the state machine role
  - test_state_machine_definition_has_status_processing: Verify the definition includes 'PROCESSING' status value
  - test_state_machine_definition_has_status_completed: Verify the definition includes 'COMPLETED' status value
  - test_state_machine_definition_has_status_failed: Verify the definition includes 'FAILED' status value
Step 2 - Run pytest tests/unit/test_dynamodb_metadata.py to confirm all new tests FAIL (red phase of TDD)

Step 3 - Implement the DynamoDB table in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py:
  - Import aws_dynamodb
  - Create dynamodb.Table with id 'SleepAudioMetadataTable'
  - Partition key: 'audioId' (AttributeType.STRING)
  - Billing mode: dynamodb.BillingMode.PAY_PER_REQUEST
  - Encryption: dynamodb.TableEncryption.AWS_MANAGED
  - Point-in-time recovery: True
  - Removal policy: RemovalPolicy.DESTROY (dev mode)

Step 4 - Extend the Step Functions state machine definition in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py:
  - Add a DynamoDB PutItem task at the BEGINNING of the chain (before the Polly task) that writes an initial metadata record with audioId (from input), status='PROCESSING', inputBucket, inputKey, createdAt
  - Add a DynamoDB UpdateItem task AFTER the Polly task (before Succeed) that updates status to 'COMPLETED' and sets updatedAt
  - Add error handling: use a Catch on the main processing to route to a DynamoDB UpdateItem task that sets status='FAILED'
  - The new chain should be: WriteInitialRecord -> PollyTask -> UpdateStatusCompleted -> Done, with a Catch on PollyTask that goes to UpdateStatusFailed -> Fail
  - Use sfn_tasks.DynamoPutItem and sfn_tasks.DynamoUpdateItem L2 constructs
  - Pass S3 event data (bucket name, object key) via JsonPath from the state machine input (which receives $.detail from EventBridge)
Step 5 - Run pytest tests/unit/test_dynamodb_metadata.py to confirm all new tests PASS (green phase)
Step 6 - Run the full test suite: pytest tests/ to confirm no regressions
Step 7 - Run cdk synth to confirm synthesis succeeds

Step 8 - Update ARCHITECTURE.md:
  - Change DynamoDB Metadata Store status from 'Planned' to 'Implemented' in the status table
  - Add green fill styling to the DDB node in the Mermaid diagram (style DDB fill:#90EE90,stroke:#333)
  - Add a new section '## Metadata Layer' describing the DynamoDB table schema (audioId partition key, attributes: status, inputBucket, inputKey, createdAt, updatedAt) and the state machine I/O handling (PutItem on start, UpdateItem on completion/failure)
  - Update the Orchestration Layer section to describe the new state machine flow: WriteInitialRecord -> PollyTask -> UpdateStatusCompleted -> Done (with error path to UpdateStatusFailed -> Fail)
acceptance_criteria: All new tests in tests/unit/test_dynamodb_metadata.py pass
All existing tests in tests/unit/test_cdk_base_stack.py and tests/unit/test_step_functions.py still pass (no regressions)
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated with DynamoDB table details and state machine I/O flow
The DynamoDB table uses on-demand billing, server-side encryption, and point-in-time recovery
The state machine has DynamoDB PutItem and UpdateItem tasks with proper IAM permissions
The state machine handles PROCESSING, COMPLETED, and FAILED status transitions
verification: pytest tests/ passes all tests (full suite, no regressions)
